title: S. O. 108(E): amending the notification dated S.O. 93(E)
description: S. O. 108(E): amending the notification dated S.O. 93(E)
text: REGD. NO. D. L.-33004/99 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II-Section 3—Sub-section (ii) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 89] NEW DELHI, FRIDAY, JANUARY 25, 2002/MAGHA 5,1923 (1) 272 GI/2002 -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTEOF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [PART U—SEC 3 (ii)] MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT AND FORESTS ORDER New Delhi, the 25th January, 2002 S.0.108(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (3) of Section 3 of the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986 (29 of 1986), the Central Government hereby makes the following amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Environment and Forests, number S.O.93(E) dated the 29th January, 1998, namely :- In the said notification, in paragraph 1,— (i) for the words "for a period of four years" the words "for a period of five years" shall be substituted; (ii) at serial number (1) for the words " Secretary, Central Vigilance Commission, Jaisalmer House, Mansingh Road, New Delhi" the words "Chairman, Food Corporation of India, Khadya Sadan, 16-20 Barakhamba Lane, NewDelhi-110001" shall be substituted; (ni) at serial number (2) for the words "Commissioner-cum-Secretary, Transport Department, Government of the National Capital Territory of Delhi, Delhi" the words "Joint Secretary, Ministry of Textiles, Government of India, New Delhi-110011" shall be substituted; (rv) for serial number (3) and the entries relating thereto, tlie following shall be substituted, namely :— "(3) Ms. Sunita Narain, Director, Centre for Science and Environment, 41, Tughlakabad Institutional Area, (Near BatraHospital), New Delhi-110062—Member."; (v) at serial number (4) for the words "Executive Director (Marketing & Sales)" the words "Managing Director " shall be substituted. [ No. Q-18011/14/90-CPA (Vol. XI)] C. VISWANATH, Jt. Secy. Note :—The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India vide number S.O. 93(E) dated the 29th January, 1998 and subsequently amended vide S.O. 68(E), dated the 25th January, 2000. Printed by the Manager, Govt, of India Prew, Ring Ro«d, Mayapuri. Now Dolhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications. Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
